feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to set master recipe to do automatic goods receipt into blocked stock?
entry.content:
Hi

I can easily make my MR do auto goods receipt in the control key, and set the storage location in the material master MRP1 tab, but how do I make it receive it to blocked stock instead of unrestricted?

entry.title: User exit in <Ustrd> field
entry.content:
Hi, I am using a custom user exit for extending the field <Ustrd> in payment DMEE XML file. The field is extended to 1500 chars and user exit is concatenating all remitance info for all invoices. However, although the values in debug appear correctly in C_VALUE parameter - the <Ustrd> not does not appear at all in XML file even though the status of the file is set as standard and there are no conditions. The note to payee is also not assigned anymore to the payment method.

Thank you very much in advance for any help.

Kasia

entry.title: How to transfer header parameters IntegrationSuite to ABAP Server Proxy (XI Adapter) - SAP ERP
entry.content:
Hi community 

we use REST (sender) to ABAP proxy (receiver) interfaces via SAP PI.
Inside server ABAP proxy we access content of SAP PI / ABAP Proxy dynamic configuration parameters aka Adapter Specific Message Attributes (ASMA).
This is a very flexible way of interface design which enables handling generic parameters required by different interfaces independent from specific interface message (payload)

code snippet read dynamic configuration parameters of ABAP Proxy

TRY.
        DATA(lo_srv_context)    =  cl_proxy_access=>get_server_context( ).
        DATA(lr_msg_id_protocol) = CAST if_wsprotocol_message_id( lo_srv_context->get_protocol( if_wsprotocol=>message_id ) ).
        me->mv_msg_id           =  lr_msg_id_protocol->get_message_id( ).

*     Auslesen Aufruf-URL
        DATA(li_internal) = CAST if_wsprotocol_internal( lo_srv_context->get_protocol( 'INTERNAL' ) ).
        DATA(lo_header)   = CAST cl_xms_inbound_proxy_plsrv( li_internal->get_framework( ) )->xmb_message->get_dynamic_header( ).

        me->mt_dyn_conf_table = lo_header->get_records( ).


      CATCH cx_ai_system_fault cx_sy_move_cast_error INTO DATA(lx_system).
        RAISE SHORTDUMP lx_system.
    ENDTRY.

In terms of migration to SAP IntegrationSuite we are looking for a way of reusing the existing ABAP proxy implementation.

Is there a way to provide dynamic configuration parameters with XI receiver adapter in SAP Integration Suite (Cloud Integration) or an alternative way to provide header parameters to SAP ERP backend.

If possible we want to avoid redesign backend interface approach. If unavoidable REST interface would be allow flexible header parameters, wright?

Any advise welcome

cheers
Jochen

entry.title: /sdf/mon: About the difference between allocated and attached
entry.content:
Question in Japanese version:

Tr-cd:/n/sdf/smonで確認できる、Snapshot Monitorにて、
Ext. Mem. allocated
Ext. Mem. attached
の項目（列）がありますが、この２つの項目の違いがわかりません。

それぞれの項目の説明と、この２つの項目の違いを教えていただけますでしょうか。

Question in English version:

What's the difference about Ext. Mem. allocated and Ext. Mem. attached in SDF/SMON ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Pass additional field from ERP to EWM while creating EGR in EWM . Could you please help.
entry.content: I want to pass additional field from ERP to EWM while creating EGR in EWM . Could you please help. I am calling /SPE/INB_EGR_CREATE from ERP to create EGR in EWM.

entry.title: Standard Cost recalculate during invoice
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a pricing condition with % for calculating the price of Material as Cost + Markup.
The issue which we have is, those Orders created during year end mostly remains open until next year.
In the new year we have to run Cost roll, so the standard cost will get changed. When Standard cost changed, those open Orders while invoicing the Cost+Markup price get changed since SAP billing always recalculating the this Cost+Markup %. We set Copy control for Item Category as D (Copy pricing elements unchanged), but still it recalculate the value during billing. Any idea this can be fixed using standard config or we must go for enhancement.

entry.title: ECC6 T-Code VKM3 error, Fill all the required entry fields
entry.content:
Dear All, 

Trying to release Sale order for Credit check in the T-Code VKM3, But getting below error. ECC6, EHP 6. i am SD Consultant. Please help.

Message no. 00055

Diagnosis

You have attempted to update data or start an action. However, not all required information was specified.

System Response

The system could not execute the action.

Procedure

Enter all required information. Fields in which you must enter data are prefilled with a checkmark or question mark ("?") by the system. If the current screen contains tabs, check all tabs to make sure you have filled in all required fields. Then restart the action.

Regards

entry.title: MS-Word as editor getting error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to use Word as an editor in SAP.
We have already installed Note 1091389 - MS Word in SAPscript: Installing new WordTemplate.dot.

The document from SAP is also signed according to our basis.

I get the following message when I go to the editor in SO10, for example:

Error loading the document
Message no. SOFFICEINTEGRATION142

Diagnosis
An internal error has occurred in SAP Document Container Control when loading the document.

Procedure
If this error occurs repeatedly, please enter an error message. Follow the corresponding instructions for creating the log file using the SAPROFFICEINTEGRATIONTRACE1 report.

 


The Standard SAP Editor is then opened automatically. What can I do?

 

best regards,

entry.title: Urgent: Incorrect Date Handling for Persian Leap Year 1403 in SAP System
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are writing to report a critical issue regarding the handling of the Persian (Jalali) calendar year 1403 in our SAP system. We have identified that the system incorrectly represents the end of the year.

Specifically, while the year 1403 is a leap year in the Persian calendar (meaning it has 366 days), our SAP system is currently displaying the last day of the year as “30 Esfand” (March 20th or 21st depending on the exact year) instead of the correct “30 Esfand” followed by “1 Farvardin” (March 21st or 22nd depending on the exact year). This is causing a significant problem because the leap day (an extra day in the last month) is not being recognized.

The incorrect date handling will have a direct impact on:

Financial Reporting: Inaccurate date calculations will lead to incorrect financial period reporting.
Scheduling: Scheduled tasks and events based on the Persian calendar will be out of sync.
Data Integrity: Data associated with dates in the year 1403 will be inaccurate.
To resolve this issue, we require your immediate assistance in the following:

Identifying the Root Cause: We need to understand why the SAP system is not correctly recognizing the leap year for the Persian calendar year 1403.
Providing a Solution: We need guidance on how to adjust the system to accurately reflect the 366 days in the year 1403, including the leap day.
Implementation Guidance: Please provide clear instructions on how to implement the solution, including any necessary patches, updates, or configuration changes.
We believe this is a critical issue that needs to be resolved urgently to ensure the accuracy of our data and business operations. We would appreciate your prompt response and assistance in resolving this matter.

Thank you for your attention to this important issue.

Sincerely,

entry.title: How to make planned orders and production/process orders different colors in CM25?
entry.content:
Hi

We would like our process orders and planned orders to have different colors in CM25. How is this customized? (without overwriting sap standard).

entry.title: SAP Error in Public Cloud: QP256 QM data: Maintain inspection point reference
entry.content:
Hi All
I've created a new Freely Defined Inspection Point in Public Cloud to be quantity based:
Number length 10 1 Quantity in UoM (No other field is populated except Field Combination (ZQ1) and Description.

I then went to Routing and add Operation with Work Center = QMLABS, Control Key QM01 and on Routing Header I added ZQ1 at Insp. Points.

On Operation Details, I selected Quantity, valuation and confirmation (production) for Insp.pointCompletion and No ref. Maintained

When I do a Check, I get error QP256.
In SAP Help, I get this:

For each respective step in the operations for the routing you define,

  • What the inspection interval should be between the inspection points (for instance, 10 minutes or 3 containers)

  • How the quantity should be entered with time-related intervals

  • Whether the last partial lot assignment, which is therefore relevant to goods receipt, takes place during results recording (optional)

I want to have an Inspection Point for every 10th Piece, but not sure where to put this.
I also don't know why I get the error.

Any help will be appreciated as there is not much available for Public Cloud.
Thanx

entry.title: MACRO PARA CARGAR UN ARCHIVO PDF EN FORMA MASIVA
entry.content:
hola

Buenas noches

disculpen ....

existira alguna macro que pueda cargar archivos pdf en forma masiva en la transaccion FB03 de forma masiva?

tengo este pero se queda en el cuadro de importacion y de alli no pasa

If Not IsObject(application) Then
Set SapGuiAuto = GetObject("SAPGUI")
Set application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine
End If
If Not IsObject(connection) Then
Set connection = application.Children(0)
End If
If Not IsObject(session) Then
Set session = connection.Children(0)
End If
If IsObject(WScript) Then
WScript.ConnectObject session, "on"
WScript.ConnectObject application, "on"
End If
session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/okcd").text = "/nfb03"
session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/txtRF05L-BELNR").text = "1500028857"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtRF05L-BUKRS").text = "5000"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/txtRF05L-GJAHR").text = "2024"
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/titl/shellcont/shell").pressButton "%GOS_TOOLBOX"
session.findById("wnd[0]/shellcont/shell").pressContextButton "CREATE_ATTA"
session.findById("wnd[0]/shellcont/shell").selectContextMenuItem "PCATTA_CREA"

quise cargarlo de esta direccion 

session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILENAME").text = "C:\Users\Luis Lezcano\Documents\01.pdf"

pero nada

agradecere mucho su ayuda

 

gracias

entry.title: Copying condition type from Quotation to Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a scenario where we have a custom condition type ZL03. It is a header condition and we are able to maintain the value in the quotation as expected.

But, when we are trying to create Sales order wrt quotation, this condition type ZL03 is being greyed out in the SO Header level whereas it is having the option to edit in SO item level.

This is not the expected behaviour. We need the option to edit this condition type in SO Header level and grey out in SO item level.

How can this be resolved?

entry.title: Fiscal year variant Change K1 to K4
entry.content: Can we update Fiscal Year variant K1 to K4? Any impact?

entry.title: SAP Analytics cloud embedded in SAP Business One on premise
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

The client has requested the possibility of displaying a story created in SAC within Business One. We assume it would need to be done with Single Sign-On so that it automatically connects the SAP user to SAC.

We have serious doubts about whether this is feasible. Does anyone know how this could be achieved? If it is possible, would the security applied in SAC through DACs in the dimensions remain intact when embedding it in Business One?

Thank you very much in advance.

Best regards.

entry.title: MIRO ERROR
entry.content: I GOT THIS ERROR WHEN POSTING MIRO

entry.title: ECC user is getting locked due to multiple wrong login attempts
entry.content:
Hi,

We are facing an issue where ECC user is getting locked due to multiple wrong login attempts. We recently updated the password for the RFC user, and the same has been updated in all the RFC channels where we are using that username.

We also updated the same password in the NWA RFC destination. However, the user is still getting locked frequently.

Can anyone suggest all the places where we should look and update the new password for the ECC user?

entry.title: Is it possible to set the "Key User Rel. State" of a CDS-View to Released?
entry.content: I want to create a custom cds view to create an analysis with embedded Analytics. The problem is that I'm not able to add an existing cds view to "Data Sources" in the fiori app "Custom CDS Views". The reason seems to be the fact that my existing cds view has the "Key User Rel. State" set to not released. Is it possible to change it to "released"?

entry.title: How to Add a New Segment to Message Type MDM_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA Without an Extension?
entry.content:
I need to add a new segment to the IDoc message type MDM_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA with basic type MDM_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA01. However, this message type does not allow extensions - “Action is not possible for generated IDoc types” (I guess because this is a standard message type and cannot be changed/edited).

This message type is outbound and is triggered when an equipment change occurs in SAP, creating a change pointer that later generates an IDoc.


What I Have Tried

1.Since I cannot use a standard extension, I manually added the segment by modifying the function module ALE_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA, which is responsible for IDoc creation.

2.I created a custom segment in WE31 (ZE1BP_IEQM_GWLEN) and populated it inside ALE_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA:

 

3.Issue:

•The segment appears correctly inside the generated IDoc with the correct data.

•However, when I modify the equipment data and reprocess the IDoc, I get IDoc status 26 (Syntax Error in IDoc).

•The error only appeared after I made changes to the equipment data, suggesting that the system is validating the IDoc structure and rejecting the new segment.

Questions

1.How can I properly add a new segment to this message type if I cannot use an extension?

2.Is there a way to modify the IDoc structure dynamically to allow this new segment?

3.Should I create a completely new message type for this? If yes, what is the recommended approach?

4.Is there an alternative method to add this field without modifying the existing message type?

 

I appreciate any insights or recommendations on the best way to handle this scenario. 🚀

entry.title: RIPW0 -SERNR DOES NOT EXIST
entry.content: This error is user getting when he tries to upload the S/N ? Any suggestion please , it happens with some random deliveries only..
